subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Supreme Court of British Columbia
precis: Appointment of Michael P. Klein of the City of Vancouver, in the Province of British Columbia, one of His Majesty’s Counsel learned in the law, to be a Judge of the Supreme Court of British Columbia.
